reasoning: The chart visualizes the monthly revenue data correctly for each year individually, but it fails to answer the core question which asks 'How much revenue did Teckentrup have... in the years 2021 to 2024' (implying a yearly total or comparison). By plotting all months on the same x-axis (1-12) without distinguishing the year visually other than by line color, the chart creates a confusing overlap where January of every year is stacked at x=1. This makes it impossible to read specific values accurately due to occlusion and does not provide the aggregated annual totals requested ('Wieviel Umsatz...'). A business user cannot easily derive the total revenue per year from this overlapping line chart. The annotations highlight single month extremes rather than answering the aggregate question.
suggested_improvement: Change the visualization to a bar chart or column chart with Years (2021-2024) on the X-axis and Total Revenue (summed over months) on the Y-axis. Alternatively, if showing monthly trends is required, use a small multiples approach or clearly separate the years on the time axis.
